title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.1120 - Supervision of agency employees required, when
text:
324.1120.  Supervision of agency employees required, when. — An individual, who is not licensed as a private investigator or private fire investigator, hired as an employee by a private investigator agency or private fire investigator agency shall work only under the direct supervision of the agency whose identification number appears on their application and shall work only for one agency at any one time.
(L. 2007 H.B. 780 merged with S.B. 308, A.L. 2011 H.B. 464)
